records.ety: [E. metal, used in a tropical sense in allusion to the temper of the metal of a sword blade. See Metal.]

defs: Substance or quality of temperament; spirit, esp. as regards honor, courage, fortitude, ardor, etc.; disposition; -- usually in a good sense; as, to test a person's mettle.
quotes: A certain critical hour which shall . . . try what mettle his heart is made of.
The winged courser, like a generous horse, Shows most true mettle when you check his course.
